name: admin_triage_bug_reports_patch_null_status
_note: Issue #39. Explicit-null status is PRESENT (Node `dto.status !== undefined` true) so the branch runs and `ALLOWED_STATUSES.includes(null)` -> false -> 400 { error:'status must be one of: new, reviewing, fix_proposed, resolved, wont_fix', code:'invalid-input', request_id:<uuid> }. Pre-fix Go collapsed present-null to absent (nil pointer) and returned 200 without mutating -> the divergence this pins. Validation 400 fires before AdminUpdate, so this mutates nothing and is order-independent vs the sibling success patch on the same row id ...007.
